column1: Hey Avery, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Our spring break is March 14-22 but we would wanna go March 16-21
Cool I got you! which destination were you lookin to book
We were looking at different prices for Punta Cana, and we saw the Occidental what's the price for that around and what comes with the package?
Yea the Occidental Punta Cana is where its at fs. I'll be there this spring too so you'll have me as a rep
I'll send all the deets, how many ppl in your group?
Oh bet yea we have a few bama groups this year. love y'all energy lol
Oh perfect, so what do you think the prices would be?
Where are they staying and we would love to be with more Bama people? Also, what are your rates? Do you think off the top of your head?
I'll just email you everything all in one so you have it all together
word whats the best email to send to?
just sent that over lmk if it came through. extended the cyber week deal in there for you and added the payment lan to make it easier on everyone
Okay perfect gonna send you my friends
bet sounds good if they have any questions just shoot me a text
Liked “bet sounds good if they have any questions just shoot me a text”
heyy Avery whats up, how we feelin about the options so far?
We're waiting for other people in our group
okay cool. some still have to talk to parents and stuff?
word. overall tho, all the details and stuff, pricing, etc. everyone is game for? just gotta make sure their rents are cool widdit?
Avery wassup any word from the others in the group
sup! We still lookin to get situated for spring break?
whats up Avery did y'all still need help with spring break or you all set?
yoo Avery did y'all get to book anything for spring break yet
yo Avery wanted to make sure I didnt miss you! is spring break still a thing for y'all or not anymore
It ending up to be only 3 of us
Still the occiedental in punta cana?
I'm sorry for not answering so much everyone is all over the place
Which destination did we want to do
Yea Occidental Punta Cana. That's where I'll be too. Sorry I missed your other text before rhat
Gotcha. Pricing is gonna be $670 per person for the full package, entire 4 nights
It's a $200 to secure, and then the remaining balance is due it 10 days
Yes does that include the booze cruise and stuff
The booze cruise is a separate add on. And then there's the off resort party pass which is for the nightclub events we host at Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, and Maroca nightclub
We have a 3 event bundle for $200, or you can get the events individually. Can always add them onto your package later on
Are there events at the resort?
And how much is the booze cruise
Yea we host events at the resort. Pool party, beach party, and there's a nightclub on the resort
It's not like a top level nightclub but it's cool
Kk are those dates good? And how much is the booze cruise
We wanna do the regular package plus the booze cruise
Okay cool let's do it. Those dates are all good to go too. I'll set up the reservation rn
We were ready to get secured tn right
Dope yea I got you. I'll send this to you in about a half an hour if that's cool!
hey just emailed that over! pardon the delay
Liked “hey just emailed that over! pardon the delay”
We are gonna talk to our parents this weekend and will get it over asap
yea just lmk! the sooner the better
We will have it by the end of the weekend!
And is it ok if we do it at different times
Like one of my friends is doing it now
yeaaa the people that are ready can start slotting on and securing their spots with the deposit
that'd be most ideal so that the reservation is active and running and you can keep the same current pricing
Kk j thought Valerie was going to do it but she has to wait for her dad too, but we'll do it soon
The reservation says something different than the email
Hey I'm trying to pay for the hotel and it says temporary reserved and won't let me take the spot
But Delaney and val did it
hey all good just wait a couple mins, itll clear
Perfect all of us are set!
Thank you so much for your help
yea just give it a bit lol. takes a sec if you just made the account
lookin forward to meetin y'all tho
hey whenever you got a sec if you could enter your flight info, that way we can set up your airport transfers
you can log into your account you made, same one you used for payments, and there is a section for flight info
yoo! were y'all looking to add any other party padd tickets to your accounts?
No we are good thank you!
hey hey safe travels today! see y'all when you get here
its been soo lit here. y'all are gonna love it lol
We wanna go to coco bongo on Wednesday
Okay word. You can buy tickets for it tomorrow
In the lobby! Go Blue hospitality desk
